info.name: DOMESv2 API
info.description:
Collection API untuk DOMESv2 Backend

## Cara Penggunaan
1. Import file ini ke Postman
2. Atur `base_url` di Collection Variables sesuai environment kamu
3. Login via endpoint **Login** → token akan auto-set ke variable `{{token}}`
4. Akses endpoint **Get Profile (Me)** langsung tanpa isi token manual

Untuk environment `local`, field `captcha` bisa dikosongkan.

request.description: Pengecekan status database, redis, dan aplikasi

Mendaftarkan user baru.

**Validasi:**
- `first_name`: required
- `last_name`: required
- `email`: required, format email
- `password`: min 6 karakter
- `confirm_password`: harus sama dengan password
- `captcha`: required jika RECAPTCHA_ENABLED=true dan ENV!=local

response.name: Created
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User registered successfully",
  "data": {
    "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...",
    "user": {
      "id": 1,
      "username": "erlangga",
      "name": "Erlangga Agustino",
      "first_name": "Erlangga",
      "last_name": "Agustino",
      "email": "erlangga@un.org",
      "type": null,
      "position": "Administrator",
      "organization": "UNITED NATIONS",
      "phone_number": "+628123456789",
      "created_at": "2024-06-23T10:00:00+07:00",
      "updated_at": "2024-06-23T10:00:00+07:00"
    }
  }
}

response.name: Conflict - Email Already Exists
Validation Error

request.description:
Login user dan mendapatkan JWT token.

**Test Script:** Token akan auto-ke set ke variable `{{token}}` untuk digunakan di endpoint lain.

response.name: User Not Found

request.description:
Mengirim email reset password.

> Endpoint selalu return 200 meskipun email tidak ditemukan (mencegah email enumeration).

response.name: Success

request.description:
Mereset password menggunakan token dari email.

**Validasi:**
- `token`: required, token 64 hex chars dari email
- `password`: min 6 karakter
- `confirm_password`: harus sama dengan password

response.name: Success
Invalid / Expired Token

item.name: Protected
item.description: Endpoint yang memerlukan JWT token. Token akan otomatis terisi setelah login via endpoint Login.

request.description:
Mendapatkan profil user yang sedang login.

**Header:** `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

> Token auto-terisi dari response endpoint Login.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User profile retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "username": "erlangga",
    "name": "Erlangga Agustino",
    "first_name": "Erlangga",
    "last_name": "Agustino",
    "email": "erlangga@un.org",
    "type": "admin",
    "position": "Administrator",
    "organization": "UNITED NATIONS",
    "phone_number": "+628123456789"
  }
}

response.name: Unauthorized - No Token
Unauthorized - Invalid Token
